def: Long and tedious talk without much substance; superfluity ofwords.
The state of being unwilling; nolition. [R.]
One who collects bees into a hive.
Of or pertaining to vaccinia or vaccination.
To entangle mischievously, as an elf might do.Elf all my hair in knots. Shak.
The act or operation of masticating; chewing, as of food.Mastication is a necessary preparation of solid aliment, withoutwhich there can be no good digestion. Arbuthnot.
An earthworm, or a worm resembling an earthworm.
A father's or mother's father; an ancestor in the next degreeabove the father or mother in lineal ascent. Grandfather longlegs.(Zoöl.) See Dady longlegs.
Without measure; unlimited; immeasurable.-- Meas"ure*less*ness, n.
